title: Nitriles and hydroxynitriles
summary: 9701 AS — nitrile formation, hydrolysis, and cyanohydrin addition.

simpleExplanation.title: Extending the carbon chain
simpleExplanation.summary: Nitriles add one carbon. They hydrolyse to acids. Aldehydes react with HCN to give hydroxynitriles.
steps: CN⁻ is nucleophile in both routes.

sections.content: **Nitriles and hydroxynitriles** (19.2) are key **synthesis steps** before **36.1 A Level routes**. Show **mechanism arrows** for HCN addition.
